detail.description: Braden Montgomery singles on a ground ball to left fielder Colby Thomas. Colson Montgomery scores. Andrew Benintendi to 3rd. Kyle Teel to 2nd.
Braden Montgomery homers (3) on a fly ball to right field. Andrew Benintendi scores. Kyle Teel scores.

Braden Montgomery singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela. Colson Montgomery to 3rd. Braden Montgomery to 2nd.

Braden Montgomery singles on a ground ball to left fielder Isaac Collins.
Braden Montgomery homers (2) on a fly ball to center field.
Braden Montgomery doubles (5) on a ground ball to right fielder Petey Halpin.
Braden Montgomery doubles (4) on a line drive to left fielder David Fry. Chase Meidroth scores.

Braden Montgomery doubles (2) on a sharp fly ball to left fielder Mauricio Dubón.
